headline: OpenAI Closes Record $122 Billion Funding Round at $852 Billion Valuation
raw_snippet: OpenAI closed its latest funding round with $122 billion in committed capital at a post-money valuation of $852 billion, the largest private funding round in history. SoftBank co-led the round alongside a16z, D.E. Shaw Ventures, MGX, TPG, and T. Rowe Price, with strategic participation from Amazon ($50B), NVIDIA ($30B), SoftBank ($30B), and Microsoft. The round grew from the $110 billion announced in February after additional commitments.
curator_notes: Primary funding announcement. Clustered with retail, Amazon, and ARK invest articles since this represents the macro funding event.

headline: OpenAI Opens Equity to Retail Investors for First Time, Raises $3 Billion from Individuals
raw_snippet: For the first time, OpenAI extended participation to individual investors through bank channels, raising $3 billion from retail participants as part of the $122 billion round.

headline: Amazon Invests $50 Billion in OpenAI, with $35 Billion Contingent on IPO or AGI Milestone
raw_snippet: Amazon agreed to invest $50 billion in OpenAI's funding round in two stages...

headline: ARK Invest Adds OpenAI to Three Flagship ETFs at Roughly 3% Allocation
raw_snippet: Cathie Wood's ARK Invest added OpenAI to three flagship ETFs...

headline: OpenAI Reports $2 Billion Monthly Revenue and 900 Million Weekly Active ChatGPT Users
raw_snippet: Alongside its funding round close, OpenAI disclosed it is generating $2 billion in monthly revenue ($13.1 billion in 2025) with more than 900 million weekly active ChatGPT users including over 50 million subscribers.

headline: CFO Sarah Friar Warns 2026 IPO Timeline Too Aggressive, Reportedly at Odds with Altman
raw_snippet: OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar has internally flagged the company's Q4 2026 IPO timeline as too aggressive, putting her at odds with CEO Sam Altman.

headline: OpenAI Acquires TBPN Tech Talk Show in First Media Company Acquisition

headline: ChatGPT Launches Voice Mode in Apple CarPlay for Hands-Free Conversations
raw_snippet: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Voice mode in Apple CarPlay, allowing users with iOS 26.4 or later to start voice conversations with ChatGPT directly from their car dashboard.

headline: OpenAI Launches Visual Product Discovery in ChatGPT via Expanded Agentic Commerce Protocol
raw_snippet: OpenAI launched richer visual product discovery in ChatGPT through its expanded Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP).

headline: Codex Launches Pay-As-You-Go Pricing alongside ChatGPT Business Price Cut
raw_snippet: OpenAI introduced Codex-only seats with pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise teams, and lowered the annual price of ChatGPT Business from $25 to $20 per seat.
curator_notes: Clustered Codex pay-as-you-go and business price cut as they are tightly related.

headline: OpenAI Cuts ChatGPT Business Annual Price from $25 to $20 Per Seat
raw_snippet: OpenAI lowered the annual price of ChatGPT Business from $25 to $20 per seat, a 20% reduction.

headline: GPT-4o Fully Retired from Custom GPTs Across All ChatGPT Plans
raw_snippet: OpenAI completed the final phase of GPT-4o's retirement from ChatGPT on April 3, 2026.
curator_notes: End of an era for GPT-4o.

headline: Major Executive Reshuffle: Simo on Leave, Lightcap Shifts Roles, Rouch Steps Down
raw_snippet: Fidji Simo takes medical leave and Greg Brockman oversees product; COO Brad Lightcap transitions to special projects with Denise Dresser taking commercial ops; CMO Kate Rouch steps down for cancer recovery.
curator_notes: Clustered the 3 major exec changes into one unified item for clarity and brevity.

headline: COO Brad Lightcap Shifts to Special Projects Role; Denise Dresser Takes Over Commercial Operations

headline: CMO Kate Rouch Steps Down for Cancer Recovery; Former Meta CMO Gary Briggs Named Interim
raw_snippet: Kate Rouch, OpenAI's chief marketing officer, stepped down from her role to focus on late-stage breast cancer recovery.
